title: Shun's Create
body:
Shun’s Create focuses on Create as it's core, a Vanilla+ experience you can enjoy alone, or with friends.

![Shun's Create (Forest)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd7a0231683404915561fd3e180f178556f61553.png)

Featured CurseForge Content: 
- [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true) + [NoBushyLeaves Addon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/staytrue-nobushyleaves) 
- [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked)
- [Create: Dough Compat](https://www.google.com/search?q=Create+Dough+Compat&ie=UTF-8)
- [Toast Control](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/toast-control)
